_comment: Per-flow click/time baselines for the performance ratchet (CLAUDE.md §13). CAPTURE MODE: all flows are being recounted to reflect REAL user interactions (every field fill/tap/keystroke = 1, not 1 per evaluate-block). Once the honest numbers stabilize in CI, copy each flow's reported click count here to start HARD-GATING it. A flow listed here may not increase its click count vs baseline; improvements ratchet it DOWN. Time is advisory only.

lifecycle/lead-to-paid-tm.note: Whole-business floor (2026-07-14 capture): lead 57 + T&M estimate 19 + send 1 + client sign 24 + realtime popup 0 + schedule 2 + time 2 + complete 2 + final pay 7. 2026-07-21 +2 (upper bound) for the new REQUIRED 'Who is this?' party-type pick at the top of the lead form; re-tighten to exact count on next live capture. Raise ONLY for a deliberate new lifecycle step, in the same commit.

lifecycle/lead-to-paid-byo.note: Whole-business floor, BYO variant (2026-07-14 capture). 2026-07-21 +2 (upper bound) for the new REQUIRED 'Who is this?' party-type pick; re-tighten on next live capture. The 90-click estimate step is the standing streamline target (templates/price-book).
